stop_condition: Stop after CUDA build, ferrum serve chat smoke, one c16 bench-serve diagnostic, and captured [batch-prefill] fallback_reason lines, or at first failure.
correctness_gate: CUDA release build rc=0, ferrum serve ready, deterministic chat smoke returns 5, bench-serve rc=0 with --fail-on-error.
performance_command: timeout 1200 target/release/ferrum bench-serve --base-url http://127.0.0.1:18117 --model gemma3:27b-gptq --dataset sharegpt --concurrency-sweep 16 --num-prompts 16 --n-repeats 1 --fail-on-error --seed 9271 --out <artifact>/bench/bench_sharegpt_c16.json
notes: Diagnostic-only product-path run to identify why Gemma3 c16 batch prefill falls back to serial prefill. Not a model release-grade gate.
